scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.db:reset: docker compose exec -T db psql -U user postgres -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'searchbundle' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid();" && docker compose exec -T db psql -U user postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS searchbundle;" && docker compose exec -T db psql -U user postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE searchbundle;" && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed:dev
scripts.db:reset:quick: docker compose exec -T db psql -U user postgres -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'searchbundle' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid();" && docker compose exec -T db psql -U user postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS searchbundle;" && docker compose exec -T db psql -U user postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE searchbundle;" && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed:quick
